title: Add unfocus/clear command
description:
Add CLI command to clear the current focus filter and return to the main board view.

Command: kbs console unfocus (or kbs console clear-focus)

Behavior:
- Clears focusedIssueId state in frontend
- Returns board to normal filtered view based on viewMode
- Does NOT change viewMode or close detail panel
- Idempotent (safe to call when not focused)

Implementation:
- Add UIControl notification event variant
- Frontend handler clears focusedIssueId state
- Button in UI should also support this action
creator: ryan.porter
